title: [Non-record] Golomb-Rice Optimal Encoding for Error Correction Tables
author: kellyvv

data.description: Replaces varint-delta encoding with Golomb-Rice coding for correction table position deltas, using auto-tuned m_bits to minimize total size.

novel_contributions: Replaces varint-delta encoding with Golomb-Rice coding for correction table compression.
Auto-tunes Golomb-Rice parameter m_bits to minimize encoded size.
Demonstrates 6-9% savings over varint encoding on benchmarked correction table sizes.
Provides an information-theoretic analysis showing near-Shannon-optimal compression for position encoding.
